steps.title: Use Desmos to get the rate
steps.content: The rate in candy bars per second is the slope of the graph. Read two points from the line, $(0,0)$ and $(2,80)$, then enter $x_1=[0,2]$, $y_1=[0,80]$, and $y_1\sim mx_1+b$. Desmos gives $m=40$.

steps.title: Read two points from the graph and calculate slope
steps.content: By hand, the slope is $\frac{80-0}{2-0}=40$. The machine wraps $40$ candy bars per second. That matches choice B.
